en: Hazardous Substances - Carcinogens, Mutagens, Reprotoxic Substances
Written notification must be submitted to the Labor Inspectorate prior to the use of carcinogenic, mutagenic, or reprotoxic (CMR) substances.\nEmployee Protection Act, Section 42(5)
Access to areas containing carcinogenic, mutagenic, or reprotoxic (CMR) substances, or Group 2–4 biological agents, must be restricted to authorized personnel.\nEmployee Protection Act, Section 44(4)
An exposure register must be maintained for individuals exposed to carcinogenic, mutagenic, or reprotoxic (CMR) substances, or Group 3–4 biological agents.\nEmployee Protection Act, Section 47(1-3)
